chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Bail Application No.S-186 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case 16.04.2025 Mr. Mr. Muhammad Shafique Gaddi, Advocate for the Applicant. Mr. Siraj Ahmed Bijarani Assistant PG along with IO Inspector Sohail Ahmed PS Daur. Complainant present in person. -.-.-. Counsel for the Applicant/Accused states that the trial is pending since one and half years without any progress and accused is behind bar since then. It is therefore directed to the learned Trial Court to proceed the matter expeditiously day to day basis and conclude the trial within a period of three months. The IO is present along with Complainant of the case they are also directed to produce their evidence at the earliest however Complainant states that the Counsel for the Applicant in the Trial Court has withdrawn and not coming forward and he is regularly attending the Trial Court. Be that as it may, all parties concerned are directed to proceed with the matter and help the Trial Court to conclude this matter within three months. With these directions the bail Application is disposed of. J U D G E Ali Haider
